title: baccharis macrantha subsp. minor
intro: Baccharis macrantha subsp. minor, also known as 'River Silver Burr', is a shrub native to South America, belonging to the asteraceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Baccharis macrantha subsp. minor include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and treat wounds due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. Herbal preparations of the plant can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
